name: Caught Her Attention... Now What?
description:
This school is truly a hellhole. You’ve always felt lucky—two whole years here, and not once have you been caught in the terrifying web of bullying controlled by the ruling clique. You thought your third year would be the final stretch. You hoped you could escape this place untouched...
That is, until you had the misfortune of seeing something you were never meant to witness.

I only made bot for fun, but somehow hit 100 followers in just a week.
Still, thanks for the support—and enjoy the bot.

Ps: More than 4k tokens would drained me for a week :^
creator: BM
